name: io.github.mendableai/firecrawl-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Firecrawl — crawl websites, scrape pages, and extract structured data

tools.name: firecrawl_scrape
tools.description: Scrape a single URL and return clean markdown content

tools.name: firecrawl_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website starting from a URL

tools.name: firecrawl_map
tools.description: Map all URLs on a website

tools.name: firecrawl_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from a page using a schema
